prompt: I've been wearing my Apple Watch for about a year. I feel like my fitness has been declining but I'm not sure. Can you look at my health export data and tell me if there are any concerning trends?

assertions.name: has_trend_momentum
assertions.description: Shows 30d vs 90d vs 180d trend comparison table

assertions.name: has_change_points
assertions.description: Presents change-point detection results (CUSUM or Bayesian)

assertions.name: has_mann_kendall
assertions.description: Reports Mann-Kendall trend test results with p-values

assertions.name: addresses_fitness_decline
assertions.description: Directly addresses the user's concern about fitness decline with data

assertions.name: has_weight_projection
assertions.description: Shows weight trajectory with regression projection

assertions.name: has_vo2max_assessment
assertions.description: Assesses VO2 Max relative to age norms
